1NF: 'NO' Atomic Values
2NF: 1NF + 'NO' Partial Dependency
3NF: 2NF + 'NO' Transitive Dependency

E-R DIAGRAM
------------
1)ENTITIES (RECTANGLE)
  --> WEAK ENTITY
  --> STRONG ENTITY
2)ATTRIBUTES (ELLIPSE)
  --> COMPOSITE ATTRIBUTES
  --> KEY ATTRIBUTES
  --> MULTI-VALUED ATTRIBUTES
  --> DERIVED ATTRIBUTES
3)RELATIONHIPS (DIAMONDS)
  --> ONE TO ONE
  --> ONE TO MANY OR MANY TO ONE(BI-DIRECTIONAL)
  --> MANY TO MANY
